themes.name: Agentic AI in research
themes.description: Articles discussing AI agents that can perform research tasks autonomously, make decisions, and interact with systems.

themes.name: AI research tools
themes.description: Articles focusing on specific AI-powered software and platforms designed to assist with various research activities.

themes.name: AI coding assistants
themes.description: Content related to AI tools that help developers write, debug, and review code.

themes.name: AI summarization
themes.description: Articles about AI capabilities for condensing large amounts of text, such as meeting notes, research papers, or transcripts, into concise summaries.

themes.name: AI for product management
themes.description: Content related to how AI is being applied to improve product strategy, development, and management processes.

themes.name: AI customer insights
themes.description: Articles focusing on AI's role in analyzing customer data to derive actionable insights for businesses.

themes.name: AI workforce impact
themes.description: Discussions on how AI is affecting job markets, skill requirements, and employment trends.

themes.name: AI for design & research
themes.description: Content exploring AI applications specifically within the fields of UX/UI design and user research methodologies.

themes.name: AI chatbot research
themes.description: Articles specifically addressing the research aspects and applications of AI-powered chatbots.

themes.name: AI for qualitative research
themes.description: Content related to AI's application in analyzing and extracting insights from qualitative data, such as interviews and open-ended feedback.

note: Themes identified by analyzing articles from curated sources, Google News, HackerNews, and DEV.to this month.
